text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Air Groove and I are visiting the shrine for
a change of pace. Or so I thought...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After one look at the long staircase leading to
the shrine, Air Groove has decided she wants to
use it for training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: First off, we should pay our respects.
choice_data_list: Wait, weren't you going to train?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and that's why we need to pay our respects.
I'll be using those steps leading up to the shrine,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's only right to give thanks to the resident god
before I begin.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, watch where you're standing!
That's where the god walks! Move over to the
side.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did no one teach you the basics of how to visit a
shrine?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, come on. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Clear your heart and offer a prayer. That is how
you show respect to the god.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap! Clap!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have thanked the god for allowing us to use the
shrine grounds for my training. Now I can use
those steps without worry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm? My body feels awfully light...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose my prayer had an effect.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's like my mind and body have been inextricably
linked, and both have been honed to a fine
edge...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's hurry up and get to those steps.
Come along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after incorporating the steps into her
training, Air Groove manages to achieve an
incredible lap time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Okay, time for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We attempt to do some training on the steps, but
Air Groove struggles to achieve her usual good
form.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, this must be punishment for my immaturity...
How could I shame myself like this before a god?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No matter. I have to be more diligent so this
doesn't happen again.
